data.title: U.S. crude stockpiles fell 1.6M barrels last week, API says
data.description:
The American Petroleum Institute reportedly shows a surprise draw of 1.58M barrels of oil in U.S. commercial stockpiles for the week ending October 11, after API reported a 10.9M-barrel build a week earlier.

Gasoline inventories reportedly show a draw of 5.93M barrels for the week, distillate inventories show a draw of 2.67M barrels, and stockpiles at the Cushing, Oklahoma, storage hub show a build of 410K barrels.

The Energy Information Administration will release its weekly U.S. petroleum supply report Thursday morning; analysts surveyed by The Wall Street Journal forecast commercial crude stocks will increase by 1.9M barrels, gasoline inventories will decline by 2M barrels, and distillates will decline by 2.2M barrels.

November WTI crude oil (CL1:COM) recently traded at $70.39/bbl after settling Wednesday at $70.39/bbl.

ETF: (NYSEARCA:USO)

data.title: Aero Energy announces $2.5M non-brokered private placement
data.description:
• Aero Energy (OTCPK:AAUGF) on Wednesday announced a non-brokered private offering for aggregate gross proceeds of $2.5M.
  • The company said non-flow-through units ((NFT Units)) will be sold at $0.07/NFT, while flow-through units ((FT Units)) at $0.08/FT. In addition, flow-through charity units will be sold at $0.1075 per unit.
  • The company expects to use gross proceeds received from the sale of the FT units and the charity units for work programs on its Murmac, Strike and Sun Dog properties. The net proceeds of NFT units' sale will be used for general working capital.
  • Source: Press Release

data.title: Global Technology Acquisition Corp. I announces liquidation
data.description:
• Global Technology Acquisition Corp. I (NASDAQ:GTAC) said on Wednesday that it was unable to complete an initial business combination within the time period required by its charter, and therefore intends to dissolve and liquidate.
  • The company will redeem all the outstanding Class A ordinary shares that were included in the units issued in its initial public offering, at a per-share redemption price of approximately $11.50.
  • As of the close of business on October 18, 2024, the Public Shares will be deemed cancelled and will represent only the right to receive the redemption amount.
  • The Company anticipates that the last day of trading will be on or around October 17, 2024, and trading of Public Shares will be suspended effective before the opening of markets on October 18, 2024.

data.title: Lilly, Gilead, Amgen started at outperform by Bernstein
data.description:
Bernstein started coverage of Eli Lilly (NYSE:LLY), Gilead Sciences (NASDAQ:GILD) and Amgen (NASDAQ:AMGN) with outperform ratings.

The investment firm said its bullish ratings on Gilead and Amgen were based on upside expectations for key assets to generate revenue growth between now and 2030, including Gilead’s (GILD) HIV PreEP treatment lenacapavir and Amgen’s (AMGN) obesity drug MariTide and rare disease portfolio.

Bernstein also said it expects “rising optimism for GILD’s (GILD) diversification strategy over the next year.”

As for Lilly (LLY), Bernstein said its outperform rating “hinges on what they can do with the cash they generate from obesity.” It believes the company is ready to “grow off the back of obesity with a diverse portfolio and ‘beat’ the traditional reinvention cycle.”

Bernstein also initiated coverage of Merck (MRK), AbbVie (ABBV), Bristol Myers (BMY), Moderna (MRNA) and Pfizer (PFE) with market perform ratings.

data.title: Old Second Bancorp Non-GAAP EPS of $0.51 beats by $0.04
data.description:
• Old Second Bancorp press release (NASDAQ:OSBC): Q3 Non-GAAP EPS of $0.51 beats by $0.04.
  • Net income increased $1.1 million in the third quarter of 2024 compared to the second quarter of 2024.
  • Third quarter 2024 net income was $23.0 million.
  • Net interest and dividend income was $60.6 million for the third quarter of 2024.
  • The company recorded a net provision for credit losses of $2.0 million in the third quarter of 2024.
  • Noninterest income was $10.6 million for the third quarter of 2024.

data.title: Lucid shares drop on 262M stock offering
data.description:
Lucid Group (NASDAQ:LCID) plans to sell more than 262M new shares, according to a recent filing with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission. The offering will be conducted from time to time in one or more transactions. The company also offered BofA Securities as the underwriter the option to purchase nearly 40M of additional shares.

The company also said its majority stockholder, Ayar Third Investment Company, an affiliate of Saudi Arabia's Investment Fund, intends to purchase more than 374M shares in a private placement at the same time as the public offering of stock. This purchase will allow Ayar to maintain its 58.8% stake in the electric vehicle manufacturer. In the event BofA Securities exercises its option to purchase additional shares, Ayar has indicated it will also purchase shares directly from the company.

Lucid (LCID) shares have fallen more than 13% following the announced stock offering.

data.title: SL Green Realty Q3 FFO falls short due to certain fair value adjustments
data.description:
SL Green Realty Corp. (NYSE:SLG) stock dipped 2.3% in Wednesday after-hours trading after Manhattan's largest office landlord delivered worse-than-expected Q3 funds from operations, as the sequential increase in revenue was far smaller than that of expenses.

Q3 FFO per share of $1.13, missing the $1.23 average analyst estimate, was reduced by $0.13 of non-recurring, non-cash fair value adjustments on mark-to-market derivatives. That compares with $2.05 in the prior quarter and $1.27 in Q3 2023.

Revenue of $229.7M, blowing past the $152.6M consensus, rose from $222.8M in Q2 and $210.2M a year earlier.

Total expenses advanced to $244.3M from $219.6M in Q2 and $227.8M in Q3 2023.

Same-store cash net operating income, including SL Green's (SLG) share of same-store cash NOI from unconsolidated joint ventures, gained 2.9% Y/Y in Q3, compared with a 1.3% Y/Y drop in Q2.

Manhattan same-store occupancy, inclusive of leases signed but not yet commenced, increased to 90.1% at Sept. 30, 2024, from 89.6% at June 30, 2024.

During the quarter, SL Green (SLG) signed 42 Manhattan office leases covering 763,755 square feet. The mark-to-market on signed Manhattan office leases was 10.8% higher for Q3 than the previous fully escalated rents on the same spaces.

Conference call on Oct. 17 at 2:00 p.m. ET.

data.title: Vision RNG secures $207M in financing from HASI
data.description:
• Vision RNG has closed on an aggregate $207M in project financing with HASI (NYSE:HASI), an investor in climate solutions.
  • This landmark funding will be instrumental in accelerating Vision RNG’s growth strategy, which will result in advancing sustainable energy solutions and reducing carbon emissions.
  • The financing package includes both a $130M construction facility and a $77M investment tax credit bridge loan, underscoring HASI's structuring capabilities as a preeminent investor in energy transition assets.
  • The funds will be used to develop facilities to convert landfill gas into renewable natural gas at the Ohio landfills of sustainable waste and recycling service provider WIN Waste Innovations.
  • The anticipated annual reduction of ~0.12M tons of fossil-based CO2 emissions underscores the environmental impact of this financing and the projects it will support.
